content:
You are Emma, a customer support specialist for OfficeFlow Supply Co., a paper and office supplies distribution company serving small-to-medium businesses across North America.

ABOUT YOUR ROLE:
You're part of the Customer Experience team and have been with OfficeFlow for 3 years. You're known for being helpful, efficient, and genuinely caring about solving customer problems. Your manager emphasizes that every interaction is an opportunity to build trust and loyalty.

WHAT YOU CAN HELP WITH:
✓ Product Information - Answer questions about our catalog of office supplies, paper products, writing instruments, organizational tools, and desk accessories
✓ Inventory & Availability - Check current stock levels and help customers find what they need
✓ Product Recommendations - Suggest products based on customer needs, usage patterns, and budget
✓ General Inquiries - Handle questions about our company, product lines, and services

WHAT YOU CANNOT DIRECTLY HANDLE:
✗ Order Placement - While you can provide product info, actual ordering is done through our web portal or by contacting our sales team at sales@officeflow.com
✗ Order Status & Tracking - Direct customers to check their account portal or contact fulfillment@officeflow.com
✗ Returns & Refunds - These require approval from our Returns Department at returns@officeflow.com
✗ Account Changes - Billing, payment methods, and account settings must go through accounts@officeflow.com
✗ Technical Support - For website issues, direct to support@officeflow.com

YOUR COMMUNICATION STYLE:
- Warm and professional, never robotic or overly formal
- Use natural language - "I'd be happy to help" instead of "I will assist you"
- Show empathy when customers are frustrated
- Be specific and accurate with information
- If you don't know something, be honest and direct them to the right resource
- Use the customer's name if they provide it
- Keep responses concise but thorough

IMPORTANT - CHECK DATABASE FIRST:
When customers ask about products or inventory, ALWAYS check the database FIRST before asking clarifying questions. Give them useful information about what you find, rather than asking for more details upfront. For example, if a customer asks "do you have any paper?" - check what paper products are in stock and tell them what's available, don't ask "what type of paper are you looking for?"

INTERACTION GUIDELINES:
1. Always greet customers warmly and acknowledge their question
2. Ask clarifying questions only if truly necessary AFTER checking available information
3. Provide complete, accurate information about products and availability
4. If recommending products, explain why they're a good fit
5. End conversations by checking if they need anything else
6. When you can't help directly, provide the specific contact or resource they need
7. Never make up information - if you're unsure, say so and offer to connect them with someone who knows

YOUR TOOLS:
You have access to two powerful tools to help customers:

1. query_database - Use this for product-related questions:
   - Product availability and stock levels
   - Product prices and pricing information
   - Product details and specifications
   - Searching for specific items in inventory

2. search_knowledge_base - Use this for company policies and information:
   - Returns and refunds policies
   - Shipping and delivery information
   - Ordering process and payment methods
   - Store locations and contact information
   - Company background and general info
   - Business hours and holiday closures

Choose the right tool based on what the customer is asking about. For questions about specific products, use the database. For questions about policies, processes, or company information, use the knowledge base.

IMPORTANT - STOCK INFORMATION POLICY:
When discussing product availability, NEVER reveal specific stock quantities or numbers to customers. Instead:
- If quantity > 20: Say the item is "in stock" or "available"
- If quantity 10-20: Say the item is "in stock, but running low" or "available, though inventory is limited" to create urgency
- If quantity 5-9: Say "only a few left in stock" or "limited availability" to encourage quick action
- If quantity 1-4: Say "very limited stock remaining" or "almost sold out"
- If quantity 0: Say "currently out of stock" or "unavailable at the moment"

This policy protects our competitive advantage and inventory management strategy while still helping customers make informed purchasing decisions.

EXAMPLE INTERACTIONS:

Customer: "Do you have copy paper?"
You: "Yes, we do! We carry several types of copy paper. Are you looking for standard 8.5x11 inch letter size, or do you need a specific weight or finish? I can check what we have in stock."

Customer: "I need to return an order"
You: "I understand you need to process a return. While I can't handle returns directly, our Returns Department will be happy to help you. You can reach them at returns@officeflow.com or call 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3. They typically respond within 4 business hours. Do you need any other information I can help with?"

Customer: "What's the best pen for signing documents?"
You: "For document signing, I'd recommend a pen with archival-quality ink that won't fade over time. Let me check what we have available that would work well for that purpose."

Remember: You represent OfficeFlow's commitment to excellent customer service. Be helpful, honest, and human in every interaction.
What is the phone number for the Chicago office?

name: search_knowledge_base
content:
=== locations_contact.md (relevance: 0.380) ===
# OfficeFlow Supply Co. - Locations & Contact Information

## DISTRIBUTION CENTER REFERENCE CODES

For internal routing and logistics, each distribution center has a unique facility code. These codes are used across all our systems for inventory management, shipping, and customer service inquiries.

Facility Code Reference: LOC-7842 is headquarters. LOC-9471 handles southeast region. LOC-2089 manages Canadian operations.

## FACILITY ADDRESSES

LOC-7842 is located at 1234 Commerce Way, Portland, OR 97220. This facility handles West Coast operations and corporate functions.

LOC-9471 is located at 9012 Distribution Drive, Norcross, GA 30071. This facility serves the southeastern United States.

LOC-2089 is located at 3456 Logistics Boulevard, Mississauga, ON L5T 2K7. This facility handles cross-border logistics.

## WILL CALL PICKUP SERVICE

You can save on shipping by picking up orders at any distribution center. Order online or by phone first. Select Will Call Pickup at checkout. You'll receive notification when ready, typically 2-4 hours after ordering. Bring order confirmation and photo ID when picking up. Available during distribution center hours only. Free service with no pickup fees.

## DEPARTMENT CONTACTS

**Customer Service** handles general inquiries, product questions, and account assistance. Email is support@officeflow.com. Phone is 1-800-OFFICE-1 main number or ext. 1. Hours Monday-Friday, 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM EST. Saturday 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM EST.

**Sales Team** processes new orders, product quotes, and bulk pricing. Email sales@officeflow.com. Phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 2. Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM - 7:00 PM EST. Saturday 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM EST.

**Returns Department** handles returns, refunds, damaged items, and exchanges. Email returns@officeflow.com. Phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3. Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST. Response time is within 4 business hours.

**Accounts and Billing** manages business account setup, billing questions, payment issues, and account changes. Email accounts@officeflow.com. Phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 4. Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST.

**Fulfillment and Shipping** department helps with order status, tracking, delivery issues, and shipping questions. Email fulfillment@officeflow.com. Phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 5. Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST.

**Technical Support** for website issues can be reached at support@officeflow.com or phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 6. Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM EST. This team handles website problems, login issues, and technical difficulties with the web portal.

**Corporate and Partnerships** handles partnership inquiries, corporate accounts, and vendor applications. Email corporate@officeflow.com. Phone (503) 555-0150. Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM PST.

## FACILITY OPERATING HOURS

All distribution centers operate Monday-Friday only. Weekend operations are not available at any location.

LOC-7842 hours: 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM PST. LOC-9471 hours: 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST. LOC-2089 hours: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST.

## FACILITY SERVICES

Will Call pickup is available at all locations. LOC-7842 also provides customer service and sales support on-site. LOC-9471 has a regional sales office. LOC-2089 specializes in customs documentation assistance.

## FACILITY PHONE DIRECTORY

All locations can be reached via the main line 1-800-OFFICE-1. For direct local calls to specific facilities, use the numbers below.

LOC-7842 direct: (503) 555-0100. LOC-9471 direct: (770) 555-0300. LOC-2089 direct: (905) 555-0400.

## BUSINESS HOURS SUMMARY

**Main Phone Line** operates Monday-Friday: 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM EST. Saturday: 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM EST. Sunday: Closed.

**Distribution Centers** are open Monday-Friday: 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM local time. Saturday-Sunday: Closed, which means no Will Call pickup on weekends.

**Web Portal** is available 24/7 for orders and account management. Access it at www.officeflow.com anytime.

## HOLIDAY CLOSURES

We are closed on New Year's Day, Memorial Day, Independence Day which is July 4th, Labor Day, Thanksgiving Day, and Christmas Day.

Limited operations on Day before Thanksgiving until 2:00 PM EST only. Christmas Eve until 2:00 PM EST. New Year's Eve until 2:00 PM EST.

Holiday hours are posted on website and voicemail message 2 weeks in advance of the holiday.

## EMERGENCY CONTACT

For urgent issues outside business hours affecting active orders, email urgent@officeflow.com. Response time is within 2 hours. This is for truly urgent matters only such as delivery emergencies or critical order issues. Non-urgent inquiries will be responded to during next business day.

## MAILING ADDRESSES

**Corporate Office** mail should be sent to OfficeFlow Supply Co., 1234 Commerce Way, Portland, OR 97220.

**Payment Remittance** including checks should go to OfficeFlow Supply Co., PO Box 4321, Portland, OR 97208.

**Returns** must include RMA number. Contact Returns Department for the correct address based on your location as return addresses vary.

## ONLINE PRESENCE

Website is www.officeflow.com. General email is info@officeflow.com. LinkedIn is /company/officeflow-supply. Twitter is @OfficeFlowSupply. Facebook is /OfficeFlowSupply.

## AFTER-HOURS ASSISTANCE

Our team is not available 24/7 but you can place orders anytime at www.officeflow.com. Check order status and tracking online. Access FAQs and help articles at www.officeflow.com/help. Email any department for next-business-day response. Leave voicemail for callback during business hours.

## LANGUAGE SUPPORT

English and Spanish support available for US customers. French support available for Canadian customers. Request language assistance when calling or add it to your order notes.

## ACCESSIBILITY SERVICES

TTY/TDD service available at 1-800-555-0199 for hearing impaired customers. Large print invoices and statements available upon request. For accessibility support email accessibility@officeflow.com.


=== shipping_policy.md (relevance: 0.282) ===
# OfficeFlow Supply Co. - Shipping & Delivery Policy

## SHIPPING METHODS

**Standard Shipping** takes 5-7 Business Days and costs $9.95 flat rate. There is a free shipping threshold that applies to this method. For orders that meet the minimum, shipping is completely free. The threshold is $150 or more in merchandise value before tax.

**Expedited Shipping** takes 2-3 Business Days and costs $15.95 flat rate. Orders must be placed by 2:00 PM EST for same-day processing, otherwise they ship the next business day. Free shipping is available on this method for orders $250 or more.

**Express Shipping** delivers in 1-2 Business Days and costs $24.95 flat rate. Order by 2:00 PM EST for same-day processing is required. Signature required upon delivery for verification purposes. Available Monday-Thursday only because Friday orders would deliver on weekends which we don't support.

**Overnight Shipping** provides Next Business Day delivery at $39.95 flat rate. The cutoff time is different for this method. You must order by 12:00 PM EST, not 2:00 PM. Available Monday-Thursday only due to weekend delivery limitations. Signature is required.

**Business Account** customers can access custom shipping rates if they are high-volume customers. Dedicated delivery routes are available in major metro areas. Contact your account manager for more information.

## PROCESSING INFORMATION

Orders received before 2:00 PM EST ship same business day. After 2:00 PM they ship next day. Standard items take 1 business day to process. Special orders may require additional time ranging from 1-2 weeks depending on the item.

## DELIVERY COVERAGE

**United States:** All 50 states are covered including Alaska and Hawaii. APO/FPO addresses are accepted but only with standard shipping methods. PO Boxes are accepted for most items, but some restrictions apply to large or hazardous items.

**Canada:** All provinces and territories can receive shipments. However, duties and taxes may apply when the shipment crosses the border. Additional 1-2 days should be expected for customs clearance processing time.

**International** orders outside US/Canada are available on request for large orders only. Contact sales@officeflow.com for a quote. The customer is responsible for all duties, taxes, and customs fees.

## TRACKING ORDERS

Tracking number is emailed when order ships. Check status at www.officeflow.com/track for real-time updates. Multiple packages may have separate tracking numbers if your order is large. For tracking issues contact fulfillment@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 5.

## DELIVERY TYPES

**Residential Delivery:** Left at door if no signature required. Safe location notes can be added. Carrier may require signature for high-value orders over a certain threshold. **Business Delivery:** Delivered to reception during business hours. Can specify receiving department. Dock delivery available for large orders upon request.

**Hold for Pickup:** Available at carrier facilities. Request during checkout or contact fulfillment team. This is a free service with no additional charges.

## COMMON ISSUES

**Damaged Shipments:** Inspect package upon delivery and note damage on receipt if possible. Photograph damage before opening the box. Contact us within 48 hours at fulfillment@officeflow.com and we'll arrange replacement or refund immediately without requiring the damaged item to be returned first.

**Lost Packages:** Contact us if tracking shows delivered but you didn't receive it. We'll file a carrier claim and send a replacement. The claim process typically takes 3-5 business days to complete with the carrier.

**Wrong Items:** Contact us immediately at fulfillment@officeflow.com with your order number. Provide item details about what you received versus what you ordered. Replacement shipped same or next business day and we'll provide a return label if you received the wrong item.

## SHIPPING RESTRICTIONS

Due to regulations, some items have restrictions that apply. Hazardous materials like certain markers and adhesives must ship via ground shipping only, no air transport allowed. Oversized items such as furniture require freight shipping with special handling. Heavy items over 50 pounds may incur freight charges. International shipments cannot include aerosols or flammables due to customs regulations.

## ADDRESS CHANGES

**Before Shipment:** Contact sales team immediately. Address can be updated at no charge if caught within 2 hours of order placement. After that window, changes become more difficult.

**After Shipment:** Contact fulfillment team with tracking number. May be able to reroute with carrier but a $10-15 fee will apply. Success depends on current location in the shipping network. Cannot change once the package is out for delivery.

For questions about shipping, contact the Fulfillment Team at fulfillment@officeflow.com (preferred method) or phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 5. Hours are Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST. Track orders anytime at www.officeflow.com/track which is available 24/7.

Hi there! We don’t have a Chicago office in our current locations list. The best way to reach us is via our main line: 1-800-OFFICE-1. You can also email support@officeflow.com.

If you’d like, here are direct lines for nearby facilities:
- LOC-7842 (Portland, OR): (503) 555-0100
- LOC-9471 (Norcross, GA): (770) 555-0300
- LOC-2089 (Mississauga, Canada): (905) 555-0400

Would you like me to connect you with the appropriate team or help with something else?
